title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
